scope: Enterprise endpoint telemetry. Multi-source SIEM ingestion across EDR, identity, DNS, and cloud planes.
platform_architecture: Two-repo model: detection-engineering-library (public, rules and methodology) + detection-platform (private, AlertTriageService and lab configs)

T1003.001.name: OS Credential Dumping: LSASS Memory
T1003.001.notes: Rules written, designated as POC for first ART validation loop. Two Sigma rules covering comsvcs.dll and Sysmon ProcessAccess paths.
rules: Suspicious LSASS Process Access via Sysmon
LSASS Memory Dump via Rundll32 comsvcs

T1558.003.name: Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets: Kerberoasting
T1558.003.notes: Rule written. Lab requires service account with SPN for realistic test.

T1087.name: Account Discovery
rules: Active Directory Enumeration via LDAP and Net Commands

T1550.002.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Hash

T1071.004.name: Application Layer Protocol: DNS
T1071.004.notes: DH-019 uses Cloudflare Gateway DNS logs (operational, dominant ingestion source). DH-005 requires lab DNS debug logging.

T1218.name: System Binary Proxy Execution
T1218.notes: Highest tuning complexity. FP check critical before production promotion.

T1003.006.name: OS Credential Dumping: DCSync
T1003.006.notes: High confidence signal. Non-DC source performing replication is near-certain malicious.

T1547.001.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys

T1110.003.name: Brute Force: Password Spraying
T1110.003.notes: Duo telemetry is primary source (operational). Entra SignInLogs blocked on P1/P2 license.

T1490.name: Inhibit System Recovery
T1490.notes: Near-zero FP rate. Shadow copy deletion has essentially no legitimate use case.

T1621.name: Multi-Factor Authentication Request Generation
T1621.notes: Duo Trust Monitor already active. This hypothesis formalizes the detection rule for correlation.

summary.lab_status: Detection lab architecture finalized. AWS isolated VPC with 4 VMs (DC, 2x Win11, Kali), dedicated dev Elastic Cloud 9.3.2 cluster, development CrowdStrike CID. ART validation loops begin upon lab VM delivery.
summary.next_milestone: DH-001 T1003.001 LSASS credential dump: first complete ART validation loop (POC for entire pipeline)
